Biggest LuLu Hypermarket in Dubai

January 29, 2026
By dubaitime
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

LuLu Hypermarket is one of the most popular and trusted retail chains in the United Arab Emirates, known for its wide selection of groceries, fresh food, electronics, clothing, household items, and international products.

In Dubai, LuLu has become a daily shopping destination for residents, workers, and tourists who value quality, variety, and affordable prices. With large-format hypermarkets located in major residential and commercial areas, LuLu offers spacious layouts, modern facilities, and extended opening hours.

To help shoppers find the biggest and most complete locations, we have prepared a list of the five largest LuLu Hypermarket stores in Dubai, including their main features, locations, and what makes each one special. Whether you are doing weekly grocery shopping or looking for a one-stop retail experience, these stores provide everything you need under one roof.

1. LuLu Hypermarket – Silicon Oasis

  • Address: Al Ain - Dubai Rd - Nadd Hessa - Dubai Silicon Oasis - Dubai - United Arab Emirates
  • Phone: +971 4 372 5000
  • Opening Hours:
    • Monday–Sunday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM
  • Website: Silicon Central LuLu Hypermarket
  • Google Maps: Find us here
  • Store Size: Approximately 184,000 sq ft (≈ 17,100 m²)

Why Visit?

LuLu Hypermarket in Silicon Oasis is currently one of the largest LuLu stores in Dubai. Located in a fast-growing residential and technology hub, it serves thousands of families, professionals, and students every day.

Key Features

  • One of the biggest LuLu Hypermarkets in Dubai
  • Extensive range of groceries, electronics, and lifestyle products
  • Spacious aisles and large parking facilities
  • Ideal for bulk and monthly shopping

2. LuLu Hypermarket – Dubai Mall Zabeel

  • Address: P6 Floor, Dubai Mall Zabeel, 100 Financial Ctr St, Za’abeel Second, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
  • Phone: +971 4 272 0300
  • Opening Hours:
    • Monday–Sunday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM
  • Website: Dubai Mall LuLu Hypermarket
  • Google Maps: Find us here
  • Store Size: Approximately 72,000 sq ft (≈ 6,700 m²)

Why Visit?

Located inside the Dubai Mall Zabeel extension, this LuLu Hypermarket is ideal for shoppers who want to combine retail, dining, and entertainment in one trip.

Key Features

  • Convenient location inside Dubai Mall
  • High-quality imported and gourmet products
  • Modern design and clean layout
  • Perfect for tourists and office workers

3. LuLu Hypermarket – Rashidiya

  • Address: Next to Al Rashidiya Police Station, 33A St, Al Rashidiya, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
  • Phone: +971 4 222 2353
  • Opening Hours:
    • Monday–Sunday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM
  • Website: LuLu UAE Official Website
  • Google Maps: Find us here
  • Store Size: Approximately 8,000–9,000 m² (≈ 86,000–97,000 sq ft)

Why Visit?

LuLu Rashidiya is one of the most established branches in Dubai and serves a large residential community.

Key Features

  • Large supermarket with strong community presence
  • Good balance of local and international products
  • Easy access from residential areas
  • Well-stocked fresh food section

Also See: Biggest Day To Day in Dubai

4. LuLu Hypermarket – Al Barsha

  • Address: 1 Umm Suqeim St, Al Barsha First, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
  • Phone: +971 4 341 8888
  • Opening Hours:
    • Monday–Sunday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM
  • Website: LuLu UAE Official Website
  • Google Maps: Find us here
  • Store Size: Approximately 8,000–9,000 m² (≈ 86,000–97,000 sq ft)

Why Visit?

Located in one of Dubai’s busiest districts, LuLu Al Barsha is popular among expatriates and families.

Key Features

  • Central location
  • Wide range of international food brands
  • Organized layout for quick shopping
  • Strong focus on fresh produce and bakery items

5. LuLu Hypermarket – Festival Plaza

  • Address: Sheikh Zayed Rd, Jebel Ali Village, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
  • Phone: +971 4 220 0804
  • Opening Hours:
    • Monday–Wednesday & Sunday: 8:00 AM – 11:00 PM
    • Thursday–Saturday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM
  • Website: Festival Plaza LuLu Hypermarket
  • Google Maps: Find us here
  • Store Size: Approximately 8,000–9,000 m² (≈ 86,000–97,000 sq ft)

Why Visit?

Located inside Festival Plaza Mall, this branch serves southern Dubai and nearby industrial areas.

Key Features

  • Large hypermarket inside a modern mall
  • Easy access from Sheikh Zayed Road
  • Suitable for family shopping trips
  • Good variety of home and lifestyle products

LuLu Hypermarket Network in Dubai

Total Number of Stores

As of July 9, 2024, there are 19 LuLu Hypermarket locations operating in Dubai.

Emirates with the Most LuLu Hypermarket Locations

Emirate Locations Population Population per Location
Abu Dhabi 37 (49%) 2.78M 75.24K
Dubai 19 (25%) 4.18M 219.84K
Sharjah 9 (12%) 2.37M 263.78K
Fujairah 3 (4%) 256K 85.33K
Umm Al Quwain 3 (4%) 72K 24.00K
Ajman 3 (4%) 505K 168.33K
Ras Al Khaimah 2 (3%) 417K 208.50K

Abu Dhabi leads in the number of LuLu Hypermarkets, followed by Dubai.

Emirates Without LuLu Hypermarket Locations

Currently, there are no emirates in the UAE without LuLu Hypermarket stores.

Main Types of LuLu Stores in the UAE

Format Description
LuLu Hypermarket Large stores with groceries and non-food items
LuLu Supermarket Medium-sized stores for daily essentials
LuLu Express Small convenience stores
LuLu Mall Hypermarket Hypermarkets inside shopping malls

Read More: The Cheapest Supermarket in Dubai You Must Visit

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

Which is the largest LuLu Hypermarket in Dubai?
LuLu Hypermarket Silicon Oasis is currently the largest, with approximately 17,100 m² of retail space.

Do LuLu stores in Dubai offer home delivery?
Yes, most LuLu stores provide home delivery and click-and-collect services.

What are LuLu’s typical opening hours?
Most locations operate from 8:00 AM to 12:00 AM.

Do large LuLu stores have restaurants?
Many branches are inside malls with food courts and cafés.

Conclusion

With their spacious layouts, wide product ranges, and convenient locations, LuLu Hypermarket’s largest stores play an important role in daily shopping across Dubai.

From Silicon Oasis to Festival Plaza, these five locations offer reliable and efficient retail experiences. Whether you are shopping for groceries, electronics, or home essentials, visiting one of these major LuLu Hypermarkets ensures a complete and satisfying shopping trip.
